description: A payment transaction object capturing payment details and methods.
title: PaymentTransaction

amount.description: Amount of money involved in the transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used for the payment (e.g., card, PayPal, bank transfer)

cardNumber.description: Credit or debit card number used for payment

cvv.description: CVV of the card used for the transaction

paypalEmail.description: PayPal email address if PayPal was used

iban.description: IBAN if bank transfer was used

createdAt.description: Date and time when the transaction was created
